'''zhadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zygotically|zygotically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zygotically|zygotically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhadate|zhadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhadatesher|zhadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadatesherĂ«m|zhadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhadatero|zhadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhadateshĂ«|zhadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadateshĂ«m|zhadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhadatero|gokizhadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhadateshĂ«|gokizhadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadateshĂ«m|gokizhadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhadankerom|gozhadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhadankeshĂ«|gozhadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadankeshĂ«m|gozhadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhadankeya|gozhadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhadaterom|zhadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadatemu|zhadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhadateya|zhadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhadaterom|gokizhadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadatemu|gokizhadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhadateya|gokizhadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhadadate|zhadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhadadatesher|zhadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadadatesherĂ«m|zhadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhadadatero|zhadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhadadateshĂ«|zhadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadadateshĂ«m|zhadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhadadatero|gokizhadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhadadateshĂ«|gokizhadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadadateshĂ«m|gokizhadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhadadankerom|gozhadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhadadankeshĂ«|gozhadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadadankeshĂ«m|gozhadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhadadankeya|gozhadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhadadaterom|zhadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadadatemu|zhadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhadadateya|zhadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhadadaterom|gokizhadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadadatemu|gokizhadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhadadateya|gokizhadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠte|zhĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠtesher|zhĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠtero|zhĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠdĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠterom|zhĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠtemu|zhĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠdĂŠteya|zhĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠdĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠdĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafdafte|zhafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafdaftesher|zhafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafdaftesherĂ«m|zhafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafdaftero|zhafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafdafteshĂ«|zhafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafdafteshĂ«m|zhafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafdaftero|gokizhafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafdafteshĂ«|gokizhafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafdafteshĂ«m|gokizhafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafdafnkerom|gozhafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafdafnkeshĂ«|gozhafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafdafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafdafnkeya|gozhafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafdafterom|zhafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafdaftemu|zhafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafdafteya|zhafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafdafterom|gokizhafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafdaftemu|gokizhafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafdafteya|gokizhafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
